description: Discover and call every paid API on the bolthub marketplace with automatic L402 Lightning payments.
name: ai.bolthub/registry

environmentVariables.description: LND REST API URL (recommended wallet; pair with LND_MACAROON). One wallet config is required.
environmentVariables.name: LND_REST_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Hex-encoded macaroon for LND (use a pay-scoped macaroon in production). Required with LND_REST_HOST.
environmentVariables.name: LND_MACAROON

environmentVariables.description: Nostr Wallet Connect string — easiest setup, works with CoinOS, Alby Hub, Zeus, and more. Alternative to LND.
environmentVariables.name: NWC_URI

environmentVariables.description: LNbits instance URL (pair with LNBITS_ADMIN_KEY). Alternative wallet.
environmentVariables.name: LNBITS_URL

environmentVariables.description: Admin API key for LNbits. Required with LNBITS_URL.
environmentVariables.name: LNBITS_ADMIN_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Phoenixd HTTP API URL (pair with PHOENIXD_PASSWORD). Alternative wallet.
environmentVariables.name: PHOENIXD_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP password for Phoenixd. Required with PHOENIXD_URL.
environmentVariables.name: PHOENIXD_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Maximum sats the server may spend per session (process lifetime). Unset = unlimited.
environmentVariables.name: BUDGET_SATS

environmentVariables.description: Optional bolthub API token, used only by the deploy_node / node_status Node Launcher tools.
environmentVariables.name: BOLTHUB_AUTH_TOKEN

title: bolthub Marketplace
